original: A New Texan favorite, this sheer JoyCo maternity bra doesn’t leave much to the imagination, especially when the latexy material gets soaked with milk until it’s all but see-through. Thankfully, it’s almost completely leak-resistant. Several small battery-powered vibrators line the undercarriage, acting as a constant low-intensity breast massage to aid in lactation. According to the label on the back, JoyCo guarantees you’ll never stop lactating as long as you wear the Bounty Bra.
